channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Spillage on pavement & road, 7th March
item.description:
At junction of cul de sac on Slades Drive heading to Marjorie McClure school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77,79, Slades Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped on Northumberland park road, 7th March
item.description:
Household furniture dumped on the pavement in Northumberland park blocking the footpath. Pedestrians will need to walk in the road to get through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 198-200, Northumberland Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole soreading on pavement, 7th March
item.description:
It is on a sloping surface between two drives and can catch people off- balance, esp.children & the elderly. The crumbling debris may result in slips and hurt dogs' paws, too .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norlands Crescent, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, junction with Champion Park. Non-offensive tags on cabinet., 7th March
item.description:
Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin and around full of rubbish, 7th March
item.description:
Bin and around full of rubbish , needs regular clean up please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensway, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair, 7th March
item.description:
Abandoned plastic chair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowper Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree on pavement outside nos. 7-11, 7th March
item.description:
Low hanging broken branch which looks like it could fall soon and cause damage to a vehicle below it or would be hit by a van/larger vehicle and break off completely.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Oakford Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 7th March
item.description:
Been getting worse and now 4 inches deep.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Compayne Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bed frame and mattress, 7th March
item.description:
This has been there for about 5 months. Previous reports have been made. Why has this not been collected?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Underhill Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of residential rubbish Mackenzie and Beckenham Eoad, 7th March
item.description:
The has been continuing since August 2025

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 potholes outside entrance to Flint insurance, 7th March
item.description:
As chislehurst Road is closed for the foreseeable causing carnage everywhere locally - could you please repair these potholes at night ? Thankyou
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Mill Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On green bt box, both sides!, 7th March
item.description:
Graffiti tags on both sides of the box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked Infront of dropped curve and on pavement, 7th March
item.description:
Reported by an elderly, partially sighted neighbour who lives at the property affected as blocking her access and parked on the curb.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fairgreen, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 7th March
item.description:
Fly tipping next to planter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lakeview Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Magic Whip laughing gas canisters have been dumped at this location., 7th March
item.description:
The canisters have been there for several days. They are probably empty but could easily be picked up by inquisitive children
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birchwood Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At the rear of Gorefield House, to the left of the entrance door at the West end., 7th March
item.description:
Loose paving slabs, meaning water and rats can get under the building

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gorefield Place, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle parked over dropped curb, 7th March
item.description:
The vehicle is parked over a dropped curb, blocking access for wheelchairs and pushchairs to get safely off the curb to cross the road. On the corner of abercorn Road and Kingsland Avenue. Been there for several hours

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keyworth Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tag, 7th March
item.description:
Graffiti tag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Dunbar Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tag, 7th March
item.description:
Right side of pharmacy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: N16 0bh, 7th March
item.description:
Levy gardens is full of bottles, cans, rubbish it’s a real eyesore
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Yoakley Road, Hackney, London
